description: A 52-mile long bridge of brittle wood. You feel an overwhelming urge to say 'blah' every five minutes.

onEnter.message: Barry suddenly appears and snatches the Magnifying Glass! 'WHOOPS!' he screeches, dropping it into the Chasm of Chaos!

W.name: West Pathway
W.description: A stone archway leading back down to the Great Farm.

B.name: Barry
B.description: Barry is blocking the way, looking smug.

dialogue.text: Your perseverance annoys me! Now you have no choice but to TAKE A SEAT!
Freddista rushes over and hurls Barry into the chasm! 'That's it!' she snaps.

G.name: Locked Gate
G.description: A heavy iron gate blocks the way back to Shoeboxlandia. It requires Chapter 2 to open.

conditions.failMessage: The gate is locked tight. The path to Shoeboxlandia will open in Chapter 2.
